personas.name: Alex
pain_points: Mid-afternoon energy slumps during back-to-back meetings
Lack of time to wait in line at premium cafes
Energy drinks that look unprofessional in a corporate setting
media_habits: Listens to business and tech podcasts during commutes
personas.buying_motivation: Needs a high-performance caffeine source that maintains a professional aesthetic and provides a reliable, sharp mental edge.
personas.persona_summary: Alex is a high-achieving corporate professional who values time-efficiency and premium quality above all else. They need a sophisticated energy solution that fits into a fast-paced boardroom environment without the sugar-heavy stigma of traditional energy drinks.

personas.name: Maya
pain_points: Creative burnout during late-night editing sessions
Traditional energy drinks clashing with their curated aesthetic
The crash associated with high-sugar beverages
Needing portable fuel for on-location shoots
media_habits: Active on Instagram Stories sharing 'Day in the Life' content
Consumes short-form video tutorials on design
Uses Pinterest and Instagram for visual inspiration
personas.buying_motivation: Driven by the 'cool factor' and brand aesthetic; wants a product that looks as good as it tastes and fuels their creative flow.
personas.persona_summary: Maya is a trend-conscious creator who treats her workspace and consumption habits as an extension of her personal brand. She seeks a premium, ready-to-drink coffee that provides the intensity of an energy drink with the sophisticated flavor profile of a specialty cold brew.

personas.name: Jordan
pain_points: Spending 4+ hours a day in a car between properties
Needing to stay 'on' and charismatic for clients while exhausted
Lukewarm or stale gas station coffee
Difficulty finding clean caffeine options on the go
media_habits: Scrolls Instagram Reels for motivational and entrepreneurial content
Uses Spotify for high-energy focus playlists
Checks social media for real-time market updates
personas.buying_motivation: Prioritizes premium convenience and a 'grab-and-go' solution that keeps them sharp for high-stakes client interactions.
personas.persona_summary: Jordan is an ambitious, mobile professional who is always on the move and views time as money. They need a reliable, cold, and potent caffeine kick that matches their 'always-on' lifestyle and desire for premium convenience.
